required_params.name: engine
required_params.description: The engine instance to use for data operations

required_params.name: table_name
required_params.description: Name of the table to select from

optional_params.name: **kwargs
optional_params.description: Additional arguments passed to the constructor

outputs.description: A new SelectPipe instance configured with the engine

from_engine.description:
Create a SelectPipe from an engine and table name

Parameters:
-----------
engine : Engine
    The engine instance to use for data operations
table_name : str
    Name of the table to select from
**kwargs : dict
    Additional arguments passed to the constructor

Returns:
--------
SelectPipe
    A new SelectPipe instance configured with the engine

optional_params.name: fetch_data
optional_params.description: Whether to fetch data if using an engine (default: True)

to_df.description:
Convert the selection to a DataFrame

Parameters:
-----------
fetch_data : bool, default=True
    Whether to fetch data if using an engine

Returns:
--------
pd.DataFrame
    DataFrame with selected columns

outputs.description: List of currently selected column names

get_selected_columns.description:
Get the list of currently selected columns

Returns:
--------
List[str]
    List of currently selected column names

outputs.description: Summary of the current selection state

get_selection_summary.description:
Get a summary of the current selection

Returns:
--------
Dict[str, Any]
    Summary containing total available columns, selected columns, selection history, and data source information

optional_params.name: **kwargs
optional_params.description: Additional arguments (not used in this implementation)

outputs.description: Summary of the pipe's current state

get_summary.description:
Get a summary of the pipe's current state and operations

Parameters:
-----------
**kwargs : dict
    Additional arguments (not used in this implementation)

Returns:
--------
Dict[str, Any]
    Summary of the pipe's current state

required_params.name: *selectors
required_params.description: One or more selectors to apply (string, list of strings, callable, or Selector objects)

outputs.description: Function that applies selection to a SelectPipe

Select.description:
Select columns using one or more selectors

Parameters:
-----------
*selectors : SelectionType
    One or more selectors to apply. Can be:
    - String: column name
    - List of strings: multiple column names
    - Callable: function that takes a Series and returns bool
    - Selector objects: contains, endswith, startswith, matches, has_type, etc.

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that applies selection to a SelectPipe

required_params.name: *selectors
required_params.description: One or more selectors to apply for removal

outputs.description: Function that removes selected columns from a SelectPipe

Deselect.description:
Remove columns using one or more selectors

Parameters:
-----------
*selectors : SelectionType
    One or more selectors to apply for removal. Same types as Select()

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that removes selected columns from a SelectPipe

outputs.description: Function that renames columns in a SelectPipe

Rename.description:
Rename columns

Parameters:
-----------
column_mapping : Dict[str, str]
    Mapping of old column names to new column names

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that renames columns in a SelectPipe

outputs.description: Function that reorders columns in a SelectPipe

Reorder.description:
Reorder columns

Parameters:
-----------
*column_order : str
    Column names in the desired order

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that reorders columns in a SelectPipe

outputs.description: Function that adds columns to a SelectPipe

AddColumns.description:
Add new computed columns

Parameters:
-----------
**new_columns : Any
    Column_name=value pairs for new columns. Values can be:
    - Constants: will be applied to all rows
    - Callables: functions that take DataFrame and return Series

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that adds columns to a SelectPipe

outputs.description: Function that selects all numeric columns

select_numeric.description:
Select all numeric columns

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects all numeric columns (integer, float, complex)

outputs.description: Function that selects all string columns

select_strings.description:
Select all string columns

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects all string/text columns

outputs.description: Function that selects all date/datetime columns

select_dates.description:
Select all date/datetime columns

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects all temporal columns (datetime, date, time)

required_params.name: pattern
required_params.description: Regex pattern to match column names

outputs.description: Function that selects columns matching the pattern

select_by_pattern.description:
Select columns matching a regex pattern

Parameters:
-----------
pattern : str
    Regular expression pattern to match column names

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects columns matching the pattern

required_params.name: prefix
required_params.description: Prefix to match at the start of column names

outputs.description: Function that selects columns starting with the prefix

select_by_prefix.description:
Select columns starting with a prefix

Parameters:
-----------
prefix : str
    Prefix to match at the start of column names

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects columns starting with the prefix

required_params.name: suffix
required_params.description: Suffix to match at the end of column names

outputs.description: Function that selects columns ending with the suffix

select_by_suffix.description:
Select columns ending with a suffix

Parameters:
-----------
suffix : str
    Suffix to match at the end of column names

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects columns ending with the suffix

required_params.name: substring
required_params.description: Substring to search for in column names

outputs.description: Function that selects columns containing the substring

select_containing.description:
Select columns containing a substring

Parameters:
-----------
substring : str
    Substring to search for in column names

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that selects columns containing the substring

outputs.description: Preview information about what would be selected

preview_selection.description:
Preview what columns would be selected without creating a pipe

Parameters:
-----------
df : pd.DataFrame
    DataFrame to preview selection on
*selectors : SelectionType
    Selectors to apply
metadata : SelectMetadata, optional
    Metadata for selection

Returns:
--------
Dict[str, Any]
    Preview information including total columns, selected columns, unselected columns, and selectors applied
